requirements.description: Dataset card documents provenance, rights, intended use, limitations, and update cadence.
Viewer, parquet conversion, config, split, and first-row checks are reviewed.
Creators, title, description, license, related identifiers, and files are ready for DOI archival.
Public, private, or gated source archive visibility is explicitly approved.
Release artifacts including data exports, documentation, and metadata are captured.

quality_gates.name: Sample export validation
quality_gates.command_or_workflow: owning repo dataset sample validation command

security_gates.name: No private or gated source leakage

phases.name: Dataset registry inventory
tasks: Map Hugging Face, Zenodo, GitHub Releases, and OSF requirements.
Record source visibility and redistribution constraints.

phases.name: Publication
tasks: Publish only after review approval and external-write approval.

submission_workflow.commit_policy: Commit manifest and evidence in the owning corpus repo only.
submission_workflow.review_policy: Review rights, provenance, sample rows, and registry metadata before publication.
submission_workflow.actions_policy: Check owning repo publication workflow before and after approved upload.
